title: Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're in Nigeria, trying to monetize your expertise by selling digital guides. But when you try to use Gumroad to sell your PDF guides, you're met with a frustrating message: "We cannot serve customers in your country." PayPal, Stripe, and other popular payment processors have also blocked your access, citing 'geographic restrictions' or 'banking limitations.' You've tried other platforms, but they all require a PayPal or Stripe account to receive payments. You're left wondering: what's the alternative? Is there a way to sell your digital guides without getting blocked by these platforms?
What Each Option Actually Offers

When considering alternatives to Gumroad and PayPal, you might look at other platforms like Sellfy or Ecwid. However, they still require you to set up a PayPal or Stripe account to receive payments. Some creators have tried using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, but this requires a steep learning curve and can be costly due to transaction fees. On the other hand, there are platforms specifically designed for creators in restricted countries, like NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce. These platforms offer a more straightforward way to receive payments, without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account. They also provide automation features that can save you time and effort.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Major payment processors like PayPal and Stripe have strict policies against serving customers in certain countries. This is due to banking limitations, regulatory requirements, or a combination of both. Gumroad, which relies on these payment processors, follows suit and blocks customers from restricted countries as well. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce cater specifically to creators in these countries, making it possible for them to receive payments without being blocked. They achieve this by partnering with local banks and payment providers, allowing them to bypass the restrictions imposed by major payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When using platforms like Gumroad or Sellfy, you're often hit with a range of fees, including transaction fees, payment processing fees, and even 'success fees' for every sale. These fees can eat into your profits, leaving you with less money in your pocket. NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offer a more transparent fee structure, with clear pricing and no hidden charges. They also guarantee fast payment processing, with funds reaching your wallet within minutes of a sale. This means you can get paid faster and keep more of your earnings.
Cryptocurrencies can be costly due to transaction fees.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

As a creator, your time is valuable. You want to focus on creating content, not managing sales and customer support. NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce understand this, which is why they offer robust automation features that can save you time and effort. With their platforms, you can automate delivery of your digital guides, set up recurring payments, and even manage customer support through their built-in tools. This means you can scale your business without getting bogged down in administrative tasks.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're looking for a straightforward way to receive payments without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce are your best bet. They offer a more transparent fee structure, fast payment processing, and robust automation features that can save you time and effort. With their Full Stack Bundle, you can get everything you need to start selling your digital guides without getting blocked by major payment processors.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The good news is that you don't have to rely on platforms like Gumroad or PayPal to sell your digital guides. NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce offer a more flexible and cost-effective way to receive payments, without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account. Simply sign up for their services, set up your payment gateway, and start selling – it's that easy.
Major payment processors often have strict policies against serving customers in certain countries.

Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling your digital guides without Gumroad or PayPal, follow these concrete action steps: Sign up for NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce, and set up your payment gateway. Configure your digital guide for automated delivery, using their built-in tools. Promote your digital guide through social media, email marketing, or other channels. Finally, review and optimize your sales process regularly, to ensure you're getting the most out of your sales. By following these steps, you can unlock new revenue streams and grow your business with confidence.
